OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY
From: Ed Llewellyn 
Sent: 28 February 2025 11:31
To: 
 ; 
 ; Rich Morris (No.10) ; 
 Cc: Ailsa Terry (No.10) ; 
 (No.10) 
Subject: LIMDIS: Scenesetter for PM-Meloni
, 
, Rich, 
,
As promised, I attach a scenesetter from me for the PM-Meloni meeting on Sunday. 
Please can we keep this to a limited distribution given the sensitivity – although please 
could you pass a copy to Michael Ellam.
Please let me know if you need anything else.
Ed
parsing_notes: Parse section headers (@ Summary, @ Background, @ Lines to use etc.) as structural anchors. Extract bullet-point content under each header. Classification markings (OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE) at top. Heavy redaction ('***') common. Yields a structured document with named sections and their content lists.
